name: DCOM Lateral Movement
description: Detects lateral movement using Distributed COM objects
query:
// Detect DCOM-based lateral movement
// Trigger on mmc.exe or dllhost.exe spawning processes from remote calls
events from edr_process
where parent_exe matches "(?i)(mmc\.exe|dllhost\.exe|excel\.exe)$"
  and exe_path matches "(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell|wscript|cscript|mshta)"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(/c|/k|-Command|-EncodedCommand)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
